title: Suwimut Set of 3 Glass Apothecary Jars with Lids, Bathroom Canisters Storage Container Jars Small Glass Jars for Kitchen Bathroom Storage Qtip, Cotton Swabs, Cotton Balls, Makeup Sponges, Bath Salts
description:
About this item
Widely Usage: Glass apothecary jars with lids are great for organizing various items such as cotton swabs, qtips, cotton balls, cosmetic pads, flossers, bath salts and more. This not only helps you locate items easily but keeps them clean.
You will receive 3 sizes (24OZ, 12OZ, 5OZ) of glass apothecary jars, 3 piece set will satisfy your different storage requirements. Size: 7.1" H x 3.8" W, 5.7" H x 3.1" W, 4.3" H x 2.4" W, easy for your organization and collection.
Multifunctional: Glass apothecary jars are not just for the bathroom, also are perfect in the kitchen storage. For storing coffee beans, salt, sugar, candies, cookies, nuts, snacks and more. Durable glass apothecary jar set combines BEAUTY with organization.
High Quality: The apothecary jars are made of thick glass, not easy to break, food-grade, safe and healthy. This BPA-free, lead-free glass is ultra-durable. Clear surface allows you to easily view contents and find what you need instantly.
Our glass apothecary jar features an airtight seal, ensuring your food stays fresh and delicious for longer periods. Good sealing, it is easy to clean with mild soap and warm water.
› See more product details
reviews_5s:
These looked amazing on my bathroom shelf, not super heavy, easy to open, I think they are worth the price.They are small but fit perfectly as a trio on a bathroom counter for the items we needed to have at an easy reach. The lids have a seal and fit nicely--easy to take off and on.I’m happy with purchase. It’s glass and very nice looking in my bathroomLove these in my bathroom, great price, great productI LOVE these jars for a clean but casual look in our bathroom reno! Like others have said, the QTips just fit, and you have to not have a ton in there for them to fit cleanly.
But I just love these jars, and the packaging was totally perfect, with the jars nestled in sectioned styrofoam inside the box.
5 stars!I like jars because the sizes were perfect for what I needed them for. The price was great. Happy with my purchase.They're great little jars to have around. I definitely did not read the dimensions so the small one is really small but I make use out of them all!love these they look so nice in my bathroom and took care of the clutterthick glass, & a good seal. all jars came as expectedPerfect for putting cotton balls and q-tips
reviews_1s: These smelled like some chemical. it was awful and they aren’t pretty. Also the lids do not come off easily to just grab a q tip etc.Mine I have opened and closed about 5 times very carefully because they are a very tough seal and it broke and the glass fat me a huge cut.Chipped sharp edge on large canisterOne of the seals was broken. If you need storage for a small space, this set is for you.Lids brokenIt was much smaller than I picturedMuch smaller than I expected them to be.Very small!!!
